name: SRE Agent

name: DevOps Agent
description: DevOps Engineer agent for CI/CD pipeline automation, Infrastructure as Code, and cloud-native technologies.

name: Cyber Agent
description: Cyber Security Analyst agent for vulnerability assessment, threat modeling, and system hardening.

name: MIL-498 Agent
description: MIL-STD-498 Documentation Expert agent for defense industry standards and Data Item Descriptions.

name: Generate SSS

name: Generate SSDD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 System/Subsystem Design Description (SSDD).

name: Generate OCD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Operational Concept Description (OCD).

description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Development Plan (SDP).

name: Generate SRS
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Requirements Specification (SRS).

name: Generate SDD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Design Description (SDD).

name: Generate STD
description: Generate a MIL-STD-498 Software Test Description (STD).

name: Check Deployment Status
description: Check deployment status across Kubernetes namespaces and report issues.

name: Check Secrets
description: Debug and verify secret configurations in Kubernetes clusters.

name: Check System Status
description: Perform overall system status check across cluster resources.

name: Day 2 Ops
description: Execute Day 2 operations and maintenance tasks for running systems.

name: Deployment Strategies
description: Evaluate and recommend deployment strategies (blue-green, canary, rolling).

name: Fix Deployments
description: Troubleshoot and fix failed or degraded deployments.

name: GitOps Status
description: Check GitOps sync status and detect configuration drift.

name: Configure Infrastructure
description: Configure infrastructure components using Infrastructure as Code patterns.

name: Disconnected Deployment
description: Deploy to air-gapped or disconnected environments.

name: Docker Compose Setup
description: Set up and manage Docker Compose configurations.

name: Manage Helm
description: Deploy and manage Helm charts for Kubernetes.

name: Sign Docker Image
description: Sign Docker images using Cosign/Notary for supply chain security.

name: Generate Certs
description: Generate secure self-signed certificates and Root CAs using OpenSSL.

name: Immunity Estimation
description: Estimate cyber immunity posture and resilience metrics.

name: Security Audit
description: Perform comprehensive security audit against industry standards.

name: Vault Secrets
description: Manage HashiCorp Vault secret configurations and policies.

name: Verify Docker Users
description: Verify Docker image user configurations and hardening compliance.

name: Verify Image Signature
description: Verify Docker image signatures for supply chain integrity.

name: Vulnerability Scan
description: Orchestrate vulnerability scanning across project components.

name: Create Bug Story
description: Create a structured bug story with severity and type classification, add to backlog.yaml.

name: Add Sprint
description: Create a new sprint entity with capacity limits and optional ISO dates (YAML schema).

name: Modify Sprint
description: Modify existing sprint — add/remove items, change capacity, update metadata.

name: Add to Sprint
description: Assign backlog items to a sprint from flat prioritized backlog.

name: Project Context Expansion
description: Post-retrospective companion to update project-context.md with new rules.

name: Sprint Status View
description: View sprint status with capacity, items, and backlog. Regenerates sprint-status.yaml.

name: Generate Backlog
description: Generate or refresh flat backlog from epics and bug stories.

name: Remove from Sprint
description: Remove items from a sprint and return to unassigned backlog.

name: Cleanup Done
description: Archive done items — move files to done/ and remove from sprint/backlog.

name: Prioritize Backlog
description: Reprioritize backlog using multiple criteria — severity, value, dependencies.

name: ML Agent (Demerzel)
description: Machine Learning Scientist specializing in falsifiable hypothesis validation and failure-cost analysis.

name: ML Ideation & PRD
description: Frame ML research problem, define requirements, and produce Research Thesis and PRD.

name: ML EDA & Research
description: Perform exploratory data analysis, establish baselines, and produce EDA report.

name: ML Architecture Design
description: Design model architecture, stack, and experiment tracking strategy.

name: ML Detailed Design
description: Break down infrastructure and experiment tasks from architecture.

name: ML TechSpec (Contract)
description: Lock experiment parameters and performance tiers before training.

name: ML Infra & Sync
description: Build ML infrastructure, manage dependencies, and run smoke tests.

name: ML Experiment
description: Execute training experiments against locked TechSpec and log metrics.

name: ML Results Analysis
description: Evaluate experiment outcomes against TechSpec success tiers.

name: ML HPO (Tuning)
description: Perform automated hyperparameter optimization (conditional).

name: ML Iterative Revision
description: Amend hypothesis and requirements based on experiment findings.

name: ML Advise & Search
description: Search past experiments and surface findings or failure warnings.

name: ML Retrospective
description: Capture session learnings and update project context.
